Bug / Task Description: The coalescer holds pending summaries one tick too long. A pending entry whose age has reached exactly the configured window is not flushed on the tick where it becomes due; it lingers until strictly past the window. An entry that has been pending for a full window should be flushed at that point. Fix the expiry comparison so entries are flushed as soon as their age reaches the window.
Commit Subject: fix(coalesce): flush summaries once the window has fully elapsed
